bottom_line: Fix the QV lint gate to scope checks to changed files or exclude pre-existing violations, and add PT018 guidance to the Implementation prompt template to prevent fix-cycle churn in Tests steps.
coverage_notes: Read S01–S05 logs in full (all < 140 KB). S09/S10 logs sampled (342 KB each) — read tail-500 + grep for errors. S11 log read full (1115 lines). S06_fix log read full. DB telemetry available (DB:UP).

findings.title: QV lint gate (S06) flags pre-existing unused-import in unrelated test file
findings.recommendation: Scope `ruff check` in the lint gate to changed files only, or exclude pre-existing violations in `ruff.toml`/`pyproject.toml`, or scope the gate to directories that the item actually touches.
evidence: ai-dev/active/I-00078/fix-cycles/I-00078_S06_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md:1 — 'The error is straightforward: `select` is imported but never used. Remove it.'
ai-dev/logs/I-00078_S06_fix1.log:16 — 'Fixed. Removed unused `select` import from tests/integration/test_e2e_seed.py'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Fix QV lint gate to scope ruff check to changed files or exclude pre-existing violations in test_e2e_seed.py; analyzed in I-00078 (see ai-dev/active/I-00078/reports/I-00078_self_assess_report.md). Target: Makefile or orch/test_runner.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: QV integration-tests gate (S10) fails on pre-existing testcontainers fixture error
findings.recommendation: Mark `tests/integration/test_e2e_seed.py` as expected-to-fail in the integration-test gate config, or add it to a skip list in `orch/test_runner.py`.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00078_S10_run1.log:64 — 'FAIL Required test coverage of 46.0% not reached. Total coverage: 3.33%'
ai-dev/active/I-00078/fix-cycles/I-00078_S10_FIX_cycle1_prompt.md — fix cycle prompt confirms testcontainers/postgres `execute_batch` error at startup
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Mark test_e2e_seed.py as skip in integration-test gate or fix the testcontainers execute_batch error; analyzed in I-00078 (see ai-dev/active/I-00078/reports/I-00078_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/test_runner.py. Effort: S.

findings.title: Code-review agents (S02, S04, S05) fail to find report files due to wrong filename convention
findings.recommendation: Add a clarifying note to CodeReview prompt templates stating the correct report naming pattern: `_<AgentName>_[...]_report.md`, e.g. `I-00078_S01_Frontend_report.md`, not `_<step>_impl_report.md`.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add report-naming convention note to CodeReview prompt templates; analyzed in I-00078 (see ai-dev/active/I-00078/reports/I-00078_self_assess_report.md). Target: templates/design/CodeReview_Prompt_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: Tests-impl agent (S03) breaks PT018 rule — fix cycle needed to learn split assertion
findings.recommendation: Add PT018 to the list of rules explicitly checked before writing assertions in the Implementation prompt template.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00078_S03_run1.log:253 — 'PT018 Assertion should be broken down into multiple parts --> tests/dashboard/test_i00078_layout.py:259:5'
ai-dev/logs/I-00078_S03_run1.log:282 — edit fixing lines 259–265: 'assert root_block, ...assert "--scrollbar-thumb" in...'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Add PT018 rule guidance to Implementation prompt template; analyzed in I-00078 (see ai-dev/active/I-00078/reports/I-00078_self_assess_report.md). Target: templates/design/Implementation_Prompt_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: S11 browser verification uses SQL seed workaround instead of e2e_fixtures file
findings.recommendation: Supply E2E DB credentials (`IW_E2E_DB_*` env vars) so the agent can run fixture SQL directly against the e2e postgres container.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00078_S11_run1.log:~80 — 'V2 required seeding 16 steps for F-00055 directly in the E2E PostgreSQL container since the worktree was not mounted in the app container'
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident Supply IW_E2E_DB_* env vars for S11 items so e2e_fixtures SQL can be run directly against the container DB; analyzed in I-00078 (see ai-dev/active/I-00078/reports/I-00078_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/daemon/browser_env.py. Effort: M.

findings.title: S05 agent uses a typo path causing a read failure (self-corrected)
findings.recommendation: No action needed — agent self-corrected after concession error.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/I-00078_S05_run1.log:20 — 'Error: File not found: /home/sgeriog/dev/iw-doc-plan/...' (note `sgeriog` vs `sergioG` typo)
